subcodes.title: Words to a visitor, spoken on 1913-05-16
subcodes.first_line: There are various grades of evil habits. There are certain souls whose moral lives are petrified and immersed in a sea of sensuality.
subcodes.first_line_orig: آن نفوس بر چند قسمند اشخاصی هستند آلودگی آنها بدرجه ا‌ی است که شر با آنها غیر مفید
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
